title: Resident Evil Villager Voices
description: Replaces vanilla's villager noises with merchant voice lines from Resident Evil 4
body:
# Features:
- Replace vanilla villager sounds with merchant voice lines from Resident Evil 4
- Add villager sound upon closing trade menu
- Reduce the frequency of ambient villager sounds

---

# Sounds:
- Death: 1
- Open Trade Menu: 4
- Close Trade Menu: 2
- Complete Trade: 11
- Ambient: 6
- Can't Afford Trade: 3


---

# Credits:
### Sound Source
All sounds used in this mod are from the game Resident Evil 4. They were compiled by [Snipz on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=axZ-SZJhN60) and [Evil Banana 202 on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EZXtZG0s0zs), and separated and edited by me. The rest of the resource pack is also by me.
